title: Inspect and lubricate tipper Z-axis linear bearings
summary: Visually inspect both tipper Z-axis linear rails for grease condition and, if the rails are dry, lubricate the bearing blocks using automotive bearing grease through the bearing block grease nipples. The source specifies two bearing blocks, one standard 1/4-in. grease nipple on each end of each block, and 1.0 to 3.0 cc of grease per block.
when_to_use: Use for preventive maintenance inspection of the tipper Z-axis linear rails and bearing blocks when checking grease condition and lubricating the bearing blocks if the rails are dry.
not_for: Do not use wiping grease on the rails as a substitute for lubricating the bearing blocks.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Inspect both Z-axis linear rails, determine whether the rails are dry, and lubricate the bearing blocks with the specified grease quantity through the grease nipples when needed.

access_or_tools_needed: Means to apply 1.0 to 3.0 cc of grease to each bearing block
Access to both Z-axis linear rails and bearing block grease nipples

access_required: Access to both Z-axis linear rails
Access to the bearing block grease nipples

visual_references.description: Tipper component identification reference for locating the tipper assembly.

steps.title: Inspect both Z-axis linear rails for grease condition
steps.purpose: Determine whether the Z-axis linear rails show adequate grease condition or require lubrication.
steps.instruction: Visually inspect both Z-axis linear rails for wetness of grease and/or signs of dried grease.
steps.expected_result: The grease condition of both Z-axis linear rails is identified.
steps.healthy_condition: Rails appear wet with grease and do not show dry grease condition requiring lubrication.
steps.failure_condition: Rails are dry or show signs of dried grease.

actions.label: Inspect rail grease condition
actions.exact_action: Visually inspect both Z-axis linear rails for wetness of grease and/or signs of dried grease.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the tipper component diagram as a general location reference for the tipper assembly while identifying the Z-axis area to inspect.

stop_or_escalate_if: The source does not provide escalation criteria beyond the lubrication instruction.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Visually inspect both Z-axis linear rails for wetness of grease and/or signs of dried grease.

steps.title: Lubricate bearing blocks if rails are dry
steps.purpose: Restore lubrication to the Z-axis linear bearing blocks when inspection shows the rails are dry.
steps.instruction: If the rails are dry, lubricate the bearing blocks using automotive bearing grease.
steps.expected_result: Bearing blocks are lubricated when dry rail condition is observed.
steps.healthy_condition: Dry-condition bearing blocks are lubricated using automotive bearing grease.
steps.failure_condition: Rails are dry but bearing blocks are not lubricated, or an unspecified lubricant is used.

actions.label: Lubricate bearing blocks
actions.exact_action: If dry, lubricate bearing blocks using automotive bearing grease.

stop_or_escalate_if: Required grease or means to apply grease is not available.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If dry, lubricate bearing blocks using automotive bearing grease.
Use of automotive bearing grease such as Mobil1.

steps.title: Apply grease at all bearing block nipples
steps.purpose: Ensure grease is applied at the correct lubrication points on both bearing blocks.
steps.instruction: Apply grease at the bearing block nipples. There are two bearing blocks, with one standard 1/4-in. nipple on each end of each block, for a total of four nipples.
steps.expected_result: All specified grease nipples on both bearing blocks are identified and used as the lubrication points.
steps.healthy_condition: Grease is applied through the four specified nipples across the two bearing blocks.
steps.failure_condition: Grease is not applied through the bearing block nipples or not all specified nipples are addressed.

actions.label: Grease bearing block nipples
actions.exact_action: Apply grease at the bearing block nipples; there are two bearing blocks, with one standard 1/4-in. nipple on each end of each block, for a total of four nipples.

stop_or_escalate_if: Bearing block grease nipples cannot be accessed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Two bearing blocks with four total grease nipples.

steps.title: Add specified grease quantity to each block
steps.purpose: Apply the source-specified amount of grease to each bearing block.
steps.instruction: Add 1.0 to 3.0 cc of grease to each block.
steps.expected_result: Each bearing block receives 1.0 to 3.0 cc of grease.
steps.healthy_condition: Grease quantity per bearing block is within the specified 1.0 to 3.0 cc range.
steps.failure_condition: Grease quantity per block is not applied or is outside the specified range.

actions.label: Measure and apply grease quantity
actions.exact_action: Add 1.0 to 3.0 cc of grease to each block.

stop_or_escalate_if: No means is available to apply the specified grease quantity.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: 1.0 to 3.0 cc of grease to each block should be adequate.

steps.title: Do not substitute rail wiping for lubrication
steps.purpose: Prevent incomplete lubrication by reinforcing the source limitation on wiping grease onto the rails.
steps.instruction: Do not treat wiping grease on the rails as adequate lubrication.
steps.expected_result: Lubrication is performed through the bearing blocks rather than by wiping grease onto the rails.
steps.healthy_condition: Bearing blocks are lubricated correctly and rail wiping is not used as the lubrication method.
steps.failure_condition: Grease is only wiped onto the rails and bearing block lubrication is not performed.

actions.label: Verify lubrication method
actions.exact_action: Wiping grease on the rails is not adequate.

stop_or_escalate_if: The intended lubrication method is only wiping grease on the rails.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Wiping grease on the rails is not adequate.

success_criteria: Both Z-axis linear rails have been visually inspected for wetness of grease and/or signs of dried grease.
If the rails were dry, the bearing blocks were lubricated using automotive bearing grease.
Grease was applied through the bearing block nipples.
Each bearing block received 1.0 to 3.0 cc of grease.
Lubrication was not performed by only wiping grease on the rails.
healthy_conditions: Z-axis linear rails are wet with grease or, if dry, the bearing blocks have been lubricated per source guidance.
All four grease nipples across the two bearing blocks are used as lubrication points when lubrication is required.
Each bearing block receives the specified grease quantity.
failure_conditions: Rails are dry and bearing blocks are not lubricated.
Grease is not applied through the bearing block nipples.
Specified grease quantity is not applied to each block.
Grease is only wiped on the rails.
escalation_guidance: The source does not provide explicit escalation guidance beyond performing lubrication when the rails are dry and noting that wiping grease on the rails is not adequate.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: General tipper component layout for locating the tipper assembly during inspection and lubrication.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Visually inspect both Z-axis linear rails for wetness of grease and/or signs of dried grease. If dry, lubricate bearing blocks using automotive bearing grease. Wiping grease on the rails is not adequate.

missing_details: The source packet does not provide explicit production stop requirements.
The source packet does not provide explicit LOTO requirements for this task.
The source packet does not provide explicit PPE requirements for this task.
The source packet does not provide explicit escalation triggers beyond the lubrication note.
The source packet does not include a directly matched image of the Z-axis linear bearing grease nipples or rails on page 98.
